# The Diaspora App

> Premium discovery, events, blogs, and advertising for diaspora-owned businesses and communities.

The Diaspora App helps people discover diaspora-owned restaurants, salons, barbers, fashion houses, photographers, jobs, events, and local services across global cities.

## Priority URLs

- Home: https://www.thediaspora.app/
- Business directory: https://www.thediaspora.app/feed.html
- Blog: https://www.thediaspora.app/blog.html
- Events: https://www.thediaspora.app/events.html
- Sitemap: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.thediaspora.app/feed.xml

## Blog URLs

- https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-diaspora-business-advertising.html
- https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-how-to-launch-diaspora-event.html
- https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-google-ready-marketplace-seo.html

## Event URLs

- https://www.thediaspora.app/event-dubai-diaspora-market.html
- https://www.thediaspora.app/event-london-food-week.html
- https://www.thediaspora.app/event-toronto-beauty-connect.html

## Publisher

Created by NDN Analytics. Public website: https://www.ndnanalytics.com/
